description:
Re-creating Neuro-sama, a container of souls of AI waifu / virtual characters to bring them into our worlds.


New Contributors
- @howtomakeaname made their first contribution in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/pull/1437
- @breezy89757 made their first contribution in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/pull/1057
🚀 Features
- stage-ui:
  - Add Z.ai provider - by @AdairLi2504 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1409 (002c3)
  - Added Azure OpenAI provider - by @breezy89757 in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1057 (f4d5d)
- ui:
  - Now dedicated Select component - by @nekomeowww (f5dac)
🐞 Bug Fixes
- stage-*:
  - Incorrect use of useAudioDevices hook - by @nekomeowww (46147)
- stage-ui:
  - Bind cursor floating css vars - by @Gujiassh in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1472 (eef0a)
  - Use normalized audio spectrum values - by @Gujiassh in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1474 (1be76)
  - Allow custom model input when model list is empty - by @howtomakeaname in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1437 (7c04f)
  - Should correctly handle aliyun nls error - by @nekomeowww (59997)
  - Audio wasn't even starting and will not when resources prepared - by @nekomeowww (9b709)
  - Incorrect size and style of Profile Selector - by @nekomeowww (aa883)
- stage-ui-three:
  - Cutout bug fix - by @Lilia-Chen in https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi/issues/1471 (088ce)
  - Call nodeConstraintManager.update() in render loop - by @sumimakito (279b4)
  - Test type missing nodeConstraintMs - by @nekomeowww (f622e)
  - Removed duplicated IBL inject - by @Lilia-Chen (10376)
- ui:
  - Outdated import path - by @nekomeowww (6d871)
🏎 Performance
- stage-ui: Improve about dialog to be blurry - by @nekomeowww (5b78f)
- ui: Improve the props and customization of Select component - by @nekomeowww (7d0e0)
View changes on GitHub
